embedding.title: Embedding
embedding.description: Provider and model for vector embedding and semantic search.
embedding.importance: Embedding is critical for memory recall, skill search, knowledge graph, and task matching accuracy. Changes affect the entire system.
embedding.providerTip: LLM provider used for generating text embeddings.
embedding.modelTip: Embedding model (e.g. text-embedding-3-small). Must support /embeddings endpoint.
embedding.supportedProviders: Verified 1536d: OpenAI (text-embedding-3-small/large), Gemini (gemini-embedding-001 + dimensions), Mistral (codestral-embed), Cohere (embed-v4), DashScope (text-embedding-v3 + dimensions). Configure dimensions in provider settings for models with native dims > 1536.
embedding.verifyRequired: Verify the embedding model before saving.
embedding.maxChunkLenHint: Maximum characters per memory chunk before splitting.
embedding.chunkOverlapHint: Overlap characters between consecutive chunks for context continuity.

ux.title: UX Behavior
ux.description: Control how the gateway displays agent activity to users.
ux.intentClassifyHint: Classify user intent before routing to the agent.
ux.intentClassifyInfo: Messages are classified to optimize agent routing and behavior.

kg.title: Knowledge Graph
kg.description: Extract entities and relationships from agent memory into a searchable knowledge graph.
kg.providerTip: LLM provider used for extracting entities from memory.
kg.minConfidenceHint: Minimum confidence threshold (0–1) for extracted entities.
kg.info: Automatically extracts entities and relationships when agents write to memory. Leave provider empty to disable.

bg.title: Background Workers
bg.description: Provider and model for background tasks (vault enrichment, consolidation, dreaming).
bg.providerTip: LLM provider for background tasks. Leave empty to use agent default.
bg.modelTip: Model for background tasks. Leave empty to use provider default.
bg.info: Used for vault enrichment (document summarization), consolidation (session summaries), and dreaming. Leave empty to fall back to the agent default provider.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Tenant skill package and slash command settings.
skills.maxUploadSizeHint: Per-file ZIP limit in MB. Allowed range: 1-500.
skills.slashEnabledHint: Detect /skill-name and /use skill-name at the start of user prompts.
skills.slashSuggestHint: Show close matches when a requested skill is not found.
skills.slashPartialHint: Let unique prefixes like /frontend activate matching skills.
skills.slashPrefixHint: Single character used before skill commands.

compaction.title: Pending Message Compaction
compaction.description: Summarize long pending message history to stay within context limits.
compaction.info: When a group chat exceeds the threshold, the LLM automatically summarizes older messages into a single compact entry, keeping the most recent ones intact for context.

alert.message: Background workers failed: {{reason}}. Features like memory consolidation and vault enrichment may not work.

reason.auth: Authentication failed (invalid or expired API key)
reason.billing: Billing issue (credits exhausted or payment required)
reason.model_not_found: Model not found (invalid model name or not available)
